overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a hooded mercenary character walking along a rocky mountain trail at night. The character traverses through narrow rocky passages, passes a small wooden market stall, and encounters a civilian NPC before continuing along the winding dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky mountain trail between steep slopes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path between rocky outcrops and slopes

entered.detail: steep rocky hillside covered with sparse grass and small shrubs
large rocky outcrop forming the right boundary of the narrow trail
tall jagged rock formation visible ahead in the distance
winding dirt and gravel trail through the mountain terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow enclosed mountain trail at night, flanked by rocky slopes on both sides. The path winds through the terrain with a large rock formation visible in the distance ahead, illuminated by moonlight against the dark blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain path opening to wider valley

events.description: wooden market stall structure becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain opens up to a wider valley

entered.detail: simple wooden structure with a canopy roof visible in the distance
gentle slope covered with dry grass and scattered low vegetation

segments.scene_description: As the path curves gently to the right, the narrow rocky corridor opens into a wider valley. The wooden market stall becomes visible ahead in the distance while the terrain transitions to grassy hillsides on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with wooden market stall and civilian presence

events.description: character approaches and passes the wooden market stall structure
character passes a standing civilian NPC on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past the wooden market structure and passing a civilian NPC standing by the path

notable_agents.action: civilian in simple clothing standing still beside the market stall

entered.detail: wooden crates and containers stacked beside the market stall
large weathered boulder formation on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the wooden market stall with stacked crates visible beside it. The path widens further as the character passes the structure and encounters a standing civilian NPC on the left, continuing along the open mountain trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain trail curving through grassy hills

events.description: wooden market stall passes out of view behind, returning to natural landscape

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path away from the market structure into open terrain

entered.detail: prominent rocky cliff face on the right side of the winding trail
range of rocky hills and mountains visible on the horizon
small trees and dense shrubs lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the market area behind, the character continues along the winding dirt path through open grassy hills. Large rock formations line the right side while scattered trees appear on the left, with distant rocky hills visible ahead under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nocturnal mountain trail that transitions from a narrow rocky corridor into an open, grassy valley. It begins with the character navigating a tight passage flanked by steep rocky slopes under a dark blue moonlit sky. As the path curves gently to the right, the enclosed terrain opens up to reveal grassy hillsides and a distant wooden market stall. The camera then follows the character past the stall and its stacked crates, passing a standing civilian NPC as the trail widens further. Finally, the scene expands into a broad landscape of winding dirt paths and open hills, moving past scattered trees and large rock formations toward distant peaks.
